care.summary: A charming low-growing plant with oval leaves featuring distinctive fishbone-pattern veins that fold up at night.
care.light: Bright to medium indirect light; low light reduces pattern intensity
care.water: Keep soil consistently moist; water when top inch feels dry. Use distilled water
care.soil: Well-draining peat or coco-coir based mix with perlite
care.humidity: Moderate to high; appreciates regular misting or a pebble tray
care.fertilizer: Dilute balanced fertilizer monthly in growing season
common_issues: Brown leaf tips from tap water or dry air
Leaf curl or faded pattern from too much direct sun
Root rot in waterlogged or compacted soil
tips: Use rainwater or distilled water to avoid chemical burn on leaf tips
The nightly leaf-folding 'prayer' motion is normal and healthy
Pinch stem tips to encourage bushier growth
Great for terrariums, hanging baskets, or as a tabletop plant
